lyrics:
Lyric BAEKHYUN - Chocolate

Romanization

So sweet chocolate
I just keep on missing it
Insane how you talk to me
Could be so sweet and bitter time to time
You're my chocolate
noganaeril deut dalkomhan gibun
Freshening like a mint
How many flavors are you, love?

neon da aneun deusi
nareul bogo isseo
jogeumssik beonjyeowaseo
nareul eoreobeorige hae
Just the same with the music
nawa nun matchwojwo Babe
And I just wanna know
What it's supposed to take

jigeum dallyeogago isseo Next to you
gollabwa Sweet or bland
And I'll try other things for you
Bring some spice to the game
naege dagawado dwae ije
Come melt down on me yeah
neomani nareul chaewojuneun
yuilhan saranginggeol

So sweet chocolate
I just keep on missing it
Insane how you talk to me
Could be so sweet and bitter time to time
You're my chocolate
noganaeril deut dalkomhan gibun
Freshening like a mint
How many flavors are you, love?

Baby I gotta know,
I gotta know you better uh
cheoncheonhi naege da allyeojumyeon dwae
anim Give me a list
joahaneun eumsikbuteo neoui Playlist
That's me too, cinnamon, shawty gon' kick
mwodeunji neowa hamkkemyeon maeil saerowo
I still can't see through yeah
The cover you're under yeah

jigeum dallyeogago isseo Next to you
gollabwa Sweet or bland
And I'll try other things for you

naege dagawado dwae ije

neomani nareul chaewojuneun
yuilhan saranginggeol

So sweet chocolate
I just keep on missing it
Insane how you talk to me

Chocolate

Chocolate

나를 보고 있어
